chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P No.S-125 of 2019 For hearing of main case 17.06.2019 Mr. Ghulam Abbas Awan Advocate alongwith applicant Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo DPG a/w SHO PS Mirpur Mathelo - Mr. Abdul Hafeez @ Sahib Dino Kalwar Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondents No.6, 8 and detenue Mst. Rozeena, which is taken on record. Detenue Mst. Rozeena is present in Court alongwith two minors Shah Jahan and Jatul @ Muskan. Respondent No.3 SHO PS Mirpur Mathelo present in Court has recorded the statement of alleged detenue Mst. Rozeena, in which she has categorically stated that she is living with her husband without any coercion or pressure from any corner. She states that neither she was kidnapped nor was she enticed away by any one; that she wants to live with her husband alongwith minors. Learned counsel for the applicant in view of such statement of alleged detenue does not press this application; however he states that so far as the custody of minors is concerned, he may be allowed to file proper application before the learned Guardian and Wards Court. Accordingly, the instant petition is dismissed as not pressed. Meanwhile police official present in Court is directed to provide legal protection to the detenue and her two minors in accordance with law. JUDGE
